title: Shaggy's Venezuelan Stew
description: A hearty, flavorful stew originating from Venezuela, made with tender beef and a variety of spices.
instructions: 1. Heat a large Dutch oven or pot over medium-high heat.
2. Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
3. Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
4. Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
5. Add the tomato paste and cook for 1-2 minutes.
6. Stir in the beef broth, water, shaggy, sweet venezuelan rice, stew, salt, and black pepper.
7. Return the beef to the pot and bring the mixture to a boil.
8. Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
9. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions, if desired.
